records.ety: [L. perfidia, fr. L. perfidus faithless; per (cf. Skr. parā away) + fides faith: cf. F. perfidie. See Faith.]

defs: The act of violating faith or allegiance; violation of a promise or vow, or of trust reposed; faithlessness; treachery.
quotes: The ambition and perfidy of tyrants.
His perfidy to this sacred engagement.
